name: Deoleo, S.A.
summary: Deoleo, S.A. engages in the production, transformation, and sale of vegetable oils, and other food and agricultural products worldwide. The company offers olive oil under the Carbonell, Bertolli, Carapelli, Koipe, Sasso, Hojiblanca, and Koipe Sol brands. It also provides seed oils, table olives, vinegars, and sauces; purchases and sells, imports, exports, processes, prepares, and markets rice, and other food and agricultural products; issues preferred shares; and offers co-generation power. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Rivas-Vaciamadrid, Spain.
